creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Created attachment 205105
Update shells/ammonite to 1.6.8

Hi,

I've attached a patch to update the shells/ammonite port to the latest version (1.6.8).

Changelog: http://ammonite.io/#Changelog

* Support for Scala 2.13.0
* Fix regression in source builtin (#964)
* Autocomplete for import $ivy statements (#957)

Regards,

Jens
